CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-29-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Geraldine Armendariz, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff. Court ordered case dismissed with prejudice at the request of Plaintiff. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Status Of Filing Of Receipt And Acknowledgment Of Order For The Deposit Of Money Into Blocked Account.
Off Calendar May-20-2016 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-10-2016 Continued To Jun-28-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Status Of Filing Of Receipt And Acknowledgment Of Order For The Deposit Of Money Into Blocked Account.
Off Calendar May-10-2016 Continued To May-24-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for status hearing on order to deposit money into blocked account.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840

Geraldine Armendariz, Esq., for Plaintiff, Johanna Hernandez.
Gregory Sowder, Esq., for Defendants, Town Car Network, Inc., and Mohamed Tolba.

At plaintiff's request, matter is continued to May 24, 2016 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 514 for further status of the deposit. No appearances are necessary if receipt is filed.

The Court grants an order appointing Ms. Armendariz as temporary guardian ad litem for Johanna Hernandez, a minor, for the purpose of depositing the settlement funds in blocked account.

Status Of Filing Of Receipt And Acknowledgment Of Order For The Deposit Of Money Into Blocked Account.
Off Calendar Apr-05-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On May-10-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2016 Continued To May-17-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action
Off Calendar Jan-07-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Geraldine Armendariz, Esq., appearing with Plaintiff Claudia Lopez, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Johanna Hernandez present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.

After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $65,500.00
Attorney's Fees: $15,625.00
Costs: $4,946.03
A net balance of $41,928.67 to be deposited into a blocked account at:
Wells Fargo Bank 125 Western Ave, Petaluma, CA 94952 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on April 5, 2016 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account.
No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodged with Dept. 514 prior to Hearing.
